allow: Bash(find "C:/Program Files" -maxdepth 3 -name "jbr" -type d 2>/dev/null ; find "C:/Program Files" -maxdepth 3 -name "Android Studio" -type d 2>/dev/null ; reg query "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Android Studio" 2>/dev/null ; reg query "HKCU\\SOFTWARE\\Android Studio" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell getprop ro.build.display.id 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell settings get global install_non_market_apps 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell settings get secure install_non_market_apps 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell pm list packages org.sayit.voiceime 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell settings put global verifier_verify_adb_installs 0 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" install -t "F:/Sayit/SayitVoiceIME/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk" 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell settings list global 2>&1 | grep -i -E "install|adb|debug|security" | head -20)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell settings list secure 2>&1 | grep -i -E "install|adb|debug|miui|xiaomi" | head -20)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell settings put secure miui_optimization 0 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell getprop persist.security.adbinstall 2>&1 && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 "C:/Users/sugar/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell getprop persist.security.adbinput 2>&1)
Bash(ls "C:/Program Files/Android/Android Studio/jbr/bin/java.exe" 2>/dev/null || ls "C:/Program Files/Android/Android Studio/jre/bin/java.exe" 2>/dev/null || where java 2>/dev/null)
